data.title: Behind Trump’s Public Bravado on the War, He Grapples With His Own Fears
data.description: The president’s impulsive style has never been tested in a sustained military conflict, and he’s been ruminating on Jimmy Carter’s failure in Iran.
data.author: Josh Dawsey and Annie Linskey
